response.justification: Despite a strong full-stack and open-source background, the candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation, cloud platforms, or secure development lifecycle (SDL) practices per IEC 62443 — core requirements for this role. His C++ exposure is limited to a 6-month academic/NI LabWindows project over a decade ago, with no recent or substantial production use. His dominant skills are in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no evidence of multi-threaded C++ systems, message brokers, MQTT, or industrial protocols.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with modern web and distributed systems
Strong open-source contributions and technical documentation skills
Proven ability to lead, mentor, and deliver complex systems across domains
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ production experience beyond early career
Lacks exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) and SDL
No demonstrated experience with MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA, or industrial IoT protocols
